title: Empowering Customers and Vendors with Exciting Rewards and Unbeatable Opportunities from July 10th – September 30th, 2025 - FinancialEDGE
description: Nigeria’s leading indigenous e-commerce and tech-driven service platform, agii.ng, has announced the launch of a double-impact promotional campaign tagged “Buy & Win” and “Subscribe & Win”, offering Nigerians an exciting opportunity to win weekly cash prizes while engaging with the platform. html:
Nigeria’s leading indigenous e-commerce and tech-driven service platform, agii.ng, has announced the launch of a double-impact promotional campaign tagged “Buy & Win” and “Subscribe & Win”, offering Nigerians an exciting opportunity to win weekly cash prizes while engaging with the platform.

Running from July 10 to September 30, 2025, the nationwide campaign is expected to reward over 500 people with millions of naira across its 12-week duration.

 

Agii.ng, known for its unique hyperlocal digital marketplace, is turning everyday buyers and business owners into weekly winners by simply encouraging interaction with the platform. The campaign is part of the company’s broader effort to deepen digital inclusion, reward user loyalty, and create a thriving ecosystem for local commerce in Nigeria.

According to the management of AGII Dynasty Limited the promoters of agii.ng, the dual campaign is not just a promotional effort, but a strategic economic intervention designed to support consumers and vendors alike amid rising costs and increased demand for trust-driven platforms in the Nigerian digital marketplace.

In the Buy & Win promo, users stand a chance to win by making purchases or booking services through agii.ng. After every transaction, buyers are required to leave a review on the platform and then forward their full name along with the name of the vendor to the official WhatsApp number provided by the company. Winners are selected every week through a transparent process and announced on all official agii.ng channels.

Each week, the platform will reward 17 lucky customers. Two people will receive Fifty Thousand Naira each, five others will win Twenty Thousand Naira each, and ten more will walk away with Five Thousand Naira each. This approach is aimed at not only rewarding frequent buyers but also building a reliable feedback and review ecosystem to strengthen user trust.

On the vendor side, “Subscribe & Win” promo is designed to encourage small and medium-scale enterprises, artisans, professionals, and manufacturers to register and showcase their businesses on agii.ng. To participate, vendors are expected to register via the official portal, upload their business or service information with images, and subscribe to either a five-month or one-year visibility plan. Upon completion, vendors are required to send in their company’s name via WhatsApp for eligibility.

Each week, twenty-eight vendors will be selected as winners. Three of them will be rewarded with Fifty Thousand Naira each, Ten with Fifteen Thousand naira, and Fifteen with Five Thousand naira. This structure allows a wide distribution of funds while offering exposure to businesses who may not otherwise have the marketing reach to grow within the competitive digital space.

Speaking on the initiative, agii.ng’sCo-Founder, Isaac Ifeanyichukwu, emphasized that the dual promo is as much about empowerment as it is about marketing. According to him, agii.ng is committed to building an inclusive platform where every user benefits, especially at a time when digital commerce is becoming the backbone of household and business consumption across Nigeria.

“This campaign is about touching lives directly,” hesaid. “We are giving everyday buyers and hardworking entrepreneurs a real chance to not just benefit from our platform but to also get cash support that can make a difference. We are building a digital economy that works for everyone not just big corporations.”

Since its launch, agii.ng has redefined the Nigerian e-commerce experience by focusing on hyperlocal discovery. The platform connects users to trusted service providers, artisans, and vendors within a close geographical radius sometimes as near as 10 meters using advanced location intelligence technology. This proximity advantage reduces delivery time, ensures better customer interaction, and enhances the sense of community-based commerce.

The platform also integrates Google Maps directly into its vendor listings, allowing users to physically locate or navigate to the businesses they wish to patronize. Whether users prefer to make purchases online or visit shops in person, agii.ng’s seamless user experience ensures that both options are available and reliable.

Another key feature that sets agii.ng apart is its emphasis on credibility. Vendors are required to provide authentic information, images, and addresses. Buyers are encouraged to review each transaction, thereby creating a transparent environment of trust, reputation, and quality assurance.

Beyond tech, the platform’s design is centered on simplicity and ease of use. Whether it’s a tailor in Yaba, a welder in Warri, or a phone repair expert in Jos, agii.ng ensures that these businesses are visible, verified, and connected to customers without the usual barriers that plague online marketplaces.

The “Buy & Win” and “Subscribe & Win” promos come at a time when Nigerians are increasingly turning to digital platforms for everyday needs. From groceries and electronics to home repairs and business services, the demand for verified, easy-to-access providers is at an all-time high. agii.ng offers not just a platform, but a solution tailored to the Nigerian lifestyle.

agii.ng also invites corporate sponsors, influencers, and media partners to collaborate in amplifying the campaign’s reach. With over ThreeMillion Naira set to be distributed in direct cash rewards, the platform sees this as an opportunity to inspire confidence, build loyalty, and promote digital engagement across various communities in Nigeria.

Winners of both promos will be announced weekly on agii.ng’s website, WhatsApp channel, and social media platforms, including Facebook, Instagram, and X (formerly Twitter). The campaign is supported by a dedicated customer service team ensuring smooth participation, transparent selection, and prompt prize distribution.

Agii.ng remains focused on delivering real value, connecting people with quality, and building one of the most innovative local e-commerce communities on the continent.

As the digital economy in Africa continues to expand, platforms like agii.ng are redefining what it means to shop, sell, and succeed online. With initiatives like “Buy & Win” and “Subscribe & Win,” Agii.ng isn’t just celebrating growth — it’s sharing it.

For buyers, vendors, and everyone in between, the message is simple: shop smart, subscribe boldly, and get rewarded — only on agii.ng.

To participate, visit www.agii.ng today. To register as a vendor, go to www.agii.ng/registeruser. For further details or media enquiries, reach out to support@agii.ng or WhatsApp the official line at +234 913 500 0738.

Agii.ng is Nigeria’s premier hyperlocal e-commerce and service discovery platform, connecting consumers with trusted product vendors and service providers in real time. Powered by advanced technology and location-based intelligence,

Agii.ng simplifies transactions, enhances vendor visibility, and strengthens buyer trust in Nigeria’s digital economy.
